g.text: One real Step Functions workflow — run it end-to-end, locally
The toolkit walks the states and decides, per step, how to execute it.
walk order: each state's output → next state's input

text.tspan: test_state can't execute .sync steps. The toolkit runs each via a
strategy — e.g. DockerBatchStrategy builds & runs the job's container
locally. No deploy, no AWS Batch needed.
The runner recurses into the child's ASL and walks it the same way
test_state applies the input/output processing; you supply its result
with a CallableStrategy or a static mock.

g.text: test_state runs the engine I/O (InputPath / Arguments / ResultSelector / Output)
a strategy executes the step locally: Docker, subprocess, your function, mock, real AWS
each state's output feeds the next state's input
